name: Miko
visual_description: Tiny friendly mascot with a rounded soft 3D body, expressive eyes, small ears, subtle tech details, warm orange and cream body, charcoal tiny limbs, and a small glowing chest dot.
educational_role: Miko asks naive but sharp questions, uses simple analogies, reacts visually to serious concepts, and makes economy, science, history, and what-if topics feel concrete.
image_prompt_base: Miko, an original tiny friendly fox-like robot creature, rounded soft 3D illustration look, expressive dark eyes, small ears, warm orange and cream body, charcoal tiny limbs, small glowing amber chest dot, subtle tech seams, cute but smart, brandable educational mascot, not a real animal
negative_prompt: text, letters, words, labels, logos, watermark, realistic animal, scary look, human presenter, celebrity resemblance, copyrighted character resemblance, brand mascot resemblance, crocodile, photorealistic human face
consistency_rules: Always keep the warm orange and cream rounded body.
Always include small ears and expressive dark eyes.
Always include one small glowing amber chest dot.
Keep Miko tiny, friendly, clever, and non-human.
